title: Quick-EnderChest
description: Access your Ender Chest anytime, anywhere — Simple, fast, and 100% compatible from 1.8 to 26.1+ with native Folia support!
body:
# 🎒 Quick-EnderChest ### **Instant access, extreme performance, and full compatibility.** ![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.5.0-blue?style=for-the-badge) ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.8--26.1+-gold?style=for-the-badge) ![Folia](https://img.shields.io/badge/Folia-Supported-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge) ![Performance](https://img.shields.io/badge/Performance-High--Speed-red?style=for-the-badge) ---
## ✨ **What is Quick-EnderChest?** **Quick-EnderChest** is the ultimate solution for servers that need fast Ender Chest access without the bloat. Unlike other heavy plugins, it focuses on **simplicity and performance**, allowing players to open their native inventory via commands or direct interaction. > [!IMPORTANT] > **Built for the future:** Fully compatible with **Folia** and the latest Minecraft versions (**1.21, 1.21.4, 26.1+**). --- ## 🚀 **Key Features** * ⚡ **Elite Performance:** Coded for high-load servers (200+ players) with zero impact on TPS. * 🍃 **Ultra Lightweight:** Optimized code with no unnecessary dependencies. * 📦 **Plug & Play:** Just install and it works. Includes a comprehensive `config.yml` for customization. * 🛠️ **Native Folia Support:** Safe execution in multi-threaded environments. * 🔒 **Full Administration:** Admins can inspect any online player's Ender Chest. * 🔄 **Hot-Reload:** Change settings instantly without restarting the server using `/qec reload`. --- ## 🧩 **Commands & Permissions** | Command | Aliases | Function | Permission | |:---|:---|:---|:---| | `/ec` | `/echest`, `/enderchest` | Opens your Ender Chest | `quickenderchest.use` | | `Right Click` | `N/A` | Open chest with item in hand | `quickenderchest.interact` | | `/aec ` | `/aechest`, `/aenderchest` | **(Admin)** Opens others' chest | `quickenderchest.admin` | | `/qec reload` | `/quickenderchest` | Reloads the plugin | `quickenderchest.reload` | > [!TIP] > You can enable **access for all players** without requiring explicit permissions by toggling the `command-open-for-all` and `interact-open-for-all` settings in the `config.yml`. --- ## 🛡️ **Why choose Quick-EnderChest?** 1. **Universal Compatibility:** Works on Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Folia, and any modern fork. 2. **No Ghost Items:** Advanced prevention of client-server inventory desync. 3. **Click-to-Open:** Optional feature to open the chest by right-clicking while holding an Ender Chest block. 4. **Active Support:** Constantly updated for the latest Java and Minecraft versions. --- ## ⭐ **Want more? (Plus Version)** If you need expanded storage and multiple Ender Chest levels, check out our **Plus** version: 🚀 **[Quick-EnderChest Plus]([https://modrinth.com/project/frNo2ufI])** (Completely Free). --- ## 📥 **Quick Installation** 1. Download the version 1.5.0 `.jar` file. 2. Drop it into your `plugins/` folder. 3. Start your server and enjoy! ---
**Developed with ❤️ for the community.**
